hero.tagline:
LIVE BEYOND BOUNDARIES,
MAKE REAL CONNECTIONS

value.title: Where Every Stream Creates Meaningful Connection
value.lede: From a simple introduction to engaging shared experiences, Offoolive transforms live streaming into a space for authentic interaction and community.
value.colLiveBody: Discover creators, join live sessions, and engage in real-time conversations that bring audiences and hosts closer together.
value.colGiftsBody: Support creators through interactive virtual gifts designed to enhance engagement and celebrate memorable live moments.
value.colSubBody: Unlock exclusive features with Offoolive subscriptions. Enjoy premium content, priority interactions with hosts, and enhanced platform privileges designed for dedicated users.

pk.body: PK mode enables creators to engage in real-time competitive streams, fostering interaction, audience participation, and a more dynamic live experience.
pk.altImage: PK Battle mode on mobile, with two competing creators and live energy effects

talent.p1: Go live and showcase your unique talents to a global audience on Offoolive.
talent.p2: Engage with viewers in real time and build your own community of supporters.
talent.p3: Every gift sent by fans boosts your stream and helps turn creativity into real rewards.
talent.p4: Grow your influence, connect with people, and make every live moment count.
talent.altImage: Offoolive live stream on a phone: performer with guitar, gifts, chat, and live controls

premium.line2: Monthly Subscriptions to Your Favorite Hosts
premium.bodyBeforeBreak: Enjoy exclusive content and special perks by
premium.altImage: Offoolive premium subscription on a phone with subscribe button, host, and reward icons

seo.homeTitle: Offoolive | Live Social Streaming & Real-Time Connection
seo.homeDescription: Offoolive (offoolive.com) is a social live streaming platform: live sessions, digital gifts, PK battles, subscriptions, and a global community. Download Offoolive today.
seo.homeH1: Offoolive — live social streaming and real-time connection
seo.contactDescription: Contact Offoolive on offoolive.com for support, partnerships, and business inquiries. We help creators and audiences on our live streaming platform.
seo.cooperationTitle: Agent Program & Business Cooperation | Offoolive | offoolive.com

contact.heroSubtitle: Building connections, supporting creators, and collaborating with partners across the global live streaming community.
contact.exploreTitle: Explore the Future of Live Social
contact.journeyBody: Offoolive is a next-generation live social platform designed to bring creators and audiences together through real-time interaction. The platform enables people to share experiences, build communities, and discover new forms of digital entertainment.
contact.missionBody: To connect creators and audiences through meaningful live interactions while providing a platform where creativity, entertainment, and community engagement thrive.
contact.visionBody: To build a trusted global live streaming ecosystem where people can express themselves, share experiences, and form authentic digital communities.
contact.assistanceIntro: If you are experiencing issues with your account, follow these steps:
contact.step1Body: Log in to your Offoolive account.
contact.step2Body: Access the help section inside the app.
contact.step3Body: Send your issue through the support system and our team will assist you.
contact.partnerLede: We welcome collaboration with businesses, agencies, and partners interested in working with the Offoolive platform.
contact.partnerHint: For advertising, partnerships, or strategic collaboration inquiries:
contact.otherHint: For general questions, platform issues, or additional support requests:

cooperation.ariaMain: Offoo Live agent program and cooperation
cooperation.intro: Build your team, support creators, and grow your earnings through the Offoolive agency program.
cooperation.becomeTagline: Build Your Team. Grow Your Earnings.
cooperation.becomeBody: Become an agency leader on Offoolive and build your own network of creators. Support hosts, grow your community, and earn commissions through your agency's performance.
cooperation.stepsIntro: Follow these simple steps to join the Offoolive agency program.
cooperation.agentStep1Body: Install the Offoolive app and create your account.
cooperation.agentStep2Body: Register and complete your profile on the platform.
cooperation.agentStep3Body: Locate and copy your unique Offoolive platform ID.
cooperation.agentStep4Body: Fill out the agent application form using your platform ID.
cooperation.agentStep5Body: After approval, start building and managing your agency.
cooperation.whatIsBody: An Offoolive Agency is a creator network managed by an agent who recruits, guides, and supports live streaming hosts. Agents help hosts grow their audience, improve content quality, and participate in platform activities. Agencies play an important role in building active communities and maintaining high-quality live streaming experiences.
cooperation.respIntro: Agents play a key role in developing the Offoolive creator community.
cooperation.resp2: Guiding hosts to improve content and engagement
cooperation.resp3: Helping hosts understand platform rules and events
cooperation.resp4: Building and managing an active creator community
cooperation.commissionBody: Agents earn commissions based on the performance of their team.
cooperation.rewardsTitle: This structure rewards agents who actively grow strong teams and support host performance.
cooperation.rewardsIntro: Agents may receive additional performance-based rewards such as:
cooperation.growthIntro: Offoolive provides a structured growth system designed to help agents expand their agencies and strengthen leadership within the platform.
cooperation.growth4: Opportunities to grow large creator networks
cooperation.joinBody: Start building your creator network, support talented hosts, and grow your influence within the Offoolive community.
cooperation.disclaimer1: Earnings are performance-based and may vary by individual.
cooperation.disclaimer2: Agents and hosts participate as independent users of the platform.
cooperation.disclaimer3: All programs are subject to Offoolive platform policies and applicable local laws and regulations.
